title: Glowing Armors
description: A resource pack that can make armors glow in the dark.
body:
A resource pack that can make armors glow in the dark and in players' inventory.  

The glow does not affect other items in the game.  

It works with most of other resource packs, and you need OptiFine Mod as the dependency.  

Resource packs that support other versions are making.  

The armors below are supported: (vanilla) chainmail armors, (vanilla) iron armors, (vanilla) gold armors and (vanilla) diamond armors.
